text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin isn't here today either.

I hear that she hasn't been seen<n>around the
academy for some time.

While I'm worried about her, she's<n>still the only
one who can decide<n>whether she'll continue to
race or not.
So...
choice_data_list: (I'm going to wait here for you.)
(I'm going to wait here for you.)

text_block_list.text: I always have and always will believe<n>in her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (What should I do now?)

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh... Taishiiiin! You have a visitor!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: TAISHIN!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ticket... What's gotten into—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Come with me! Now!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The heck? You want me to watch a<n>basketball
game?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I suuure do!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
There's a player I've been following<n>lately, and
she's in the starting five in<n>today's game! It's
been ages since<n>she started!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I know you like sports, but did<n>you have to
drag me into this?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I get really energized when I watch<n>sports. Like all,
"Yaaah!" Fired up,<n>y'know what I mean?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: So, well... I figured if you watched<n>too...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You could feel like me and get all...<n>YAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah. Okay, I get you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'll watch the game, so stop yelling<n>already.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yay, Taishin! Hehe! I'll turn on the TV!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I'm pretty sure I've seen that player<n>with the red
hair before.)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Count that basket! With her eleventh<n>three-pointer,
she nails the<n>buzzer-beater and clinches the game
for her team!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoooaaa! That was so, so, soamazing! Woooow!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Did you see that, Taishin?! The girl<n>with the red
hair was incredible,<n>right?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
She didn't seem to be doing well last<n>year, but
then she suddenly got super<n>good this spring!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (This spring?)

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
I mean, come on! No one's rooting for<n>you! No one
thinks you can win!

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't that make you want to give<n>up? Most
people would...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh! It's the postgame<n>interview—they're gonna
talk to her!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: You were amazing on the court!

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'm glad my training paid<n>off.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
We heard that you'd been struggling<n>for some
time—did something snap<n>you out of it?

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm a basketball player, but I<n>wasn't
blessed with height, as you<n>can see.

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
I was getting left behind because of<n>my stature,
and I was in a pretty bad<n>place this spring.

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to give it all up since I<n>figured no one
expected anything of<n>me, but...

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
Someone gave me the courage not to<n>give up. Her
way of thinking's a bit<n>odd, but she's not a
quitter. She's<n>stronger than anyone I know.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (It's her...)

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
We don't play the same sport, but<n>she's the
athlete I admire the most.

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
That's why I decided to show the<n>world who I
really am—no matter how<n>weak or pathetic they
might see me!

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text: I want to be proud to show everyone<n>the real me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaah! That's sooo touching!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What is that? Some<n>passive-aggressive jab at
me? "Ooh,<n>look at her! She's so small, but she's
trying! What an inspiration!" Ugh.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You're wrong!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You refuse to lose even when the<n>odds are
against you, and you never<n>give up no matter how
tough things<n>are!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Your determination is what makes<n>you so cool!
You really inspire and<n>encourage me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
At least, that's what I've always<n>thought about
you, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You're not my rival because you're<n>small!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You're my rival because you'reyou!

I can't even count the number of<n>times I've
flip-flopped between<n>leaving or waiting a little
longer for<n>Narita Taishin.
But just as the sun begins to set...<n>she appears.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Have you been here this whole time?
choice_data_list: ...Yeah.
...Yeah.

text_block_list.text: You mean, like, every day?
choice_data_list: Yeah.
Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Why do you have so much faith in<n>me?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You've been like that ever since you<n>scouted me,
even though I don't<n>have the slightest bit of faith
in<n>myself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I just don't know what to do<n>anymore. I...
choice_data_list: Do you want to quit?
Do you want to quit?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list: Choosing not to race is a noble choice too.
Choosing not to race is a noble choice too.

text_block_list.text: No.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
No! I don't want to give up! As if I'd<n>do that right
now!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But I don't know what to do! I'm not<n>proud of
who I am! I just see<n>someone revoltingly pathetic!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
How am I supposed to believe that<n>I'm fine the
way I am—that I can<n>continue to race like this?
There's no<n>way!
choice_data_list:
If you can't believe in yourself, then I'll just
double my faith in you!

If you can't believe in yourself, then I'll just
double my faith in you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list: Lay all your insecurities on me!
Lay all your insecurities on me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: A-all of them?
choice_data_list:
I'll keep reassuring you until you believe in
yourself!

I'll keep reassuring you until you believe in
yourself!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, what the heck? What are<n>you even
saying right now...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Look, I've come this far, but my<n>mindset hasn't
changed at all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Why would you double your faith to<n>cover for me?
What if you're stuck<n>with that crap forever?
choice_data_list: I don't care how long it takes!
I don't care how long it takes!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What if it takes your entire lifetime,<n>stupid?!
choice_data_list: I'd still do it!

text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pfft.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Heh... Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe you'd agree to believe<n>in me for
your entire life.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You really are an idiot.

Narita Taishin says that she'll try<n>running a little
more.

Her decision made, we begin to talk<n>about our
next race.

There's one I want to suggest that<n>might help her
gain a more positive<n>outlook on things.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: The Nikkei Sho?
choice_data_list:
It's held at Nakayama Racecourse, just like the
Satsuki Sho.

It's held at Nakayama Racecourse, just like the
Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho is where Narita<n>Taishin left her
mark on the<n>world—where everyone finally
recognized her abilities.

I put forward the idea of racing again<n>at the place
she had her major<n>turning point.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'll give it a shot.
choice_data_list: Really?
Really?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'll go with you again... and try.
